The Internet Engineering Task Force (IETF) published a draft for an Agent Identity, Trust and Lifecycle Protocol (AITLP) on April 5, 2026. This protocol defines mechanisms for AI agents to prove their identity, establish their authorized capabilities, and manage their lifecycle, including r
